channel.title: Mail-System on Mi&Bee Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mail-System on Mi&Bee Blog

item.title: Enterprise Mail System Architecture Design and Mail Flow Analysis
item.description:
Introduction

This article introduces the three-tier architecture design of enterprise mail systems and the complete mail receiving and sending processes. As a critical component of enterprise IT infrastructure, the mail system must address multiple challenges including high-concurrency access, massive data processing, security assurance, and scalability.

Three-Tier Architecture Design

The enterprise mail system employs a classic three-tier architecture, where each layer has distinct responsibilities and works collaboratively to build a complete, efficient, and secure mail service platform.
